renders/sbike/cutouts/0.png.key_features: This image provides a comprehensive front 3/4 view of the sBike, clearly showing the blue LED light ring, display screen with S-logo, and SPORTSTECH branding.

renders/sbike/cutouts/1.png.key_features: This image provides a clear view of the display screen with streaming functions, the S-logo, handlebar, red resistance knob, and the SPORTSTECH branding on the frame.

renders/sbike/cutouts/2.png.key_features: This image provides a clear front 3/4 view of the entire sBike, highlighting the display screen, handlebar, seat, pedals, and the glowing flywheel.

renders/sbike/cutouts/3.png.key_features: This image provides a good three-quarter view of the bike, highlighting the display, handlebars, pedals, and the blue LED light ring.

renders/sbike/cutouts/6.png.key_features: This image provides a comprehensive front 3/4 view of the sBike, clearly showing all major components including the glowing blue LED rings and the display.

renders/sbike/cutouts/7.png.key_features: This image provides a clear view of the display screen, handlebar, water bottle holder, and the resistance knob from a front-three-quarter angle.
